task_name: D3 Strategy Status Audit — Artifact-Backed API Contract

plan_only_declaration.summary: P258M defines the API contract only. No route is implemented in this task. No UI is implemented. No DB is queried or written. No recommendation, production, registry, controlled_apply, or deployment paths are touched. No null generation, p-values, paired tests, backtest, or real candidate methods are used.

route_purpose: Serve a read-only artifact-backed payload for the future D3 Strategy Status / Contract Audit page
List all strategies and their current lifecycle and evidence status
Show D3 contract-readiness status separately from lifecycle and evidence status
Prevent D3 contract status from being interpreted as approval, recommendation, or prediction endorsement
Provide a historical/read-only evidence index — not betting advice
first_implementation_notes: First implementation must be artifact-backed only — no DB query
May consume pre-published artifacts: P251 evidence dashboard, P257A best-strategy overview, P258L page plan
Must not mutate registry, production state, recommendation logic, or deployment paths
Artifact must be read at startup or request time from outputs/research/ directory
Route must return 200 with payload conforming to this contract

data_source_policy.rationale: First implementation is artifact-backed to avoid live DB dependency and keep the route read-only. Future iterations may add lightweight DB queries after explicit authorization.

top_level_payload_fields.description: UTC timestamp when the response was generated
List of artifact file paths that back this payload
The route path that served this response (e.g., '/api/replay/d3-strategy-status-audit')
Display title for the page (e.g., 'D3 Strategy Status / Contract Audit')
Summary counts: total_strategies, by_lifecycle_status, by_evidence_status, by_d3_contract_status
Available filter options keyed by filter name, each an array of allowed values
Per-strategy rows conforming to the row field contract
Required safety copy that must always be present in the payload
Explicit booleans confirming: no_db_write, no_recommendation_logic, no_registry_mutation, no_production_change, no_prediction_claim, no_betting_advice
Identifier of the next authorized task (e.g., 'P258N: read-only artifact-backed API route implementation only, if explicitly authorized')

required_row_fields.description: Lottery type identifier (e.g., DAILY_539, BIG_LOTTO, POWER_LOTTO)
Current lifecycle status (e.g., ADOPTED, PROVISIONAL, REJECTED, RETIRED, HISTORICAL_ARTIFACT, EXPERIMENTAL)
Current evidence status (e.g., VALIDATED, PENDING, NULL, REJECTED_BY_OOS, OBSERVATION_ONLY)
Number of replay rows for this strategy in strategy_prediction_replays
Draw coverage description (e.g., '1500 draws', 'short window only')
Best-N-bet strategy status from P257A overview if available
Path or identifier of the most recent evidence artifact for this strategy
D3 contract-readiness status — one of the allowed values only
Human-readable reason for the d3_contract_status value
Mandatory warning: 'D3 contract status is NOT approval. NOT_YET_REJECTED is not approval.' Must always be present regardless of d3_contract_status.
Mandatory disclaimer: 'D3 is not a prediction model. Contract validation does not imply improved prediction accuracy.'
Mandatory disclaimer: 'This information is historical/read-only evidence only. It is not betting advice.'

allowed_d3_contract_statuses.meaning: Strategy has not yet been evaluated by D3. No evaluation result exists.
Strategy input contract meets D3 schema/provenance requirements. NOT_YET_REJECTED by D3 — this is not approval.
Strategy input contract fails one or more D3 validators. D3 evaluation is blocked until contract issues are resolved.
Strategy is a historical artifact without active candidate data. D3 evaluation is not applicable.
Strategy has no replay rows in strategy_prediction_replays. D3 evaluation is not applicable.

forbidden_d3_contract_statuses.reason: D3 is not an approval gate. No approval status may exist.
D3 does not promote strategies. Promotion is a separate governance decision.
D3 does not determine production readiness. No production decision may be inferred.
D3 does not make recommendations. No recommendation may be inferred from D3 status.
D3 is not a prediction model. No prediction accuracy claim may be made.

required_filters.description: If true, include only strategies with replay_row_count > 0
If true, include only strategies with a non-null latest_evidence_artifact

required_safety_disclaimers: D3 is not a prediction model.
Contract validation is not strategy evaluation.
Passing contract validation does not imply improved prediction accuracy.
This API is historical/read-only evidence, not betting advice.

future_task_split.p258n_authorized_scope: P258N may implement the read-only artifact-backed API route (GET /api/replay/d3-strategy-status-audit) only, if explicitly authorized after P258M is merged.
future_task_split.p258o_authorized_scope: P258O may implement the UI display page only, if explicitly authorized after P258N API route is merged.
future_task_split.running_d3_on_real_candidate_methods: FORBIDDEN — requires separate future task and explicit authorization beyond P258O
future_task_split.next_allowed_task: P258N: read-only artifact-backed API route implementation only, if explicitly authorized
